2026

Leopards: Beginner 7-12 years oldScheduleContact UsContact Us Here

2026

The Academy will be closed on the following dates: February 16 - Presidents’ Day May 23 - 25 - Memorial Day holiday weekend July 4 - Independence Day September 5 - 7 - Labor Day holiday weekend September 1 - Labor Day October TBD - CKFA 17th Annual Skills Day Tournament November 26 - 29 - Thanksgiving holiday weekend December 23 - January 3, 2027 - Winter Break 2026 Events CHECK BACK FOR UPDATES February 17 - Chinese New Year February 21 - Performance at Santana Row February 28 - Workshop with Lo Si Lengyel March 7 - San Francisco Chinese New Year Parade May 16 - PH Art, Wine, and Music Festival May 24, 25 - Bay Area KidFest performances June TBD - Clayton Pride Parade June TBD - Kung Fu, Tai Chi in the Park Potluck Picnic July 4 - Clayton or Concord 4th of July Parade July 13 -17 and July 20 - 24 - Summer Day Camp *Dates are subject to change.

Check back frequently for updates.
